The '''Systech aural blaster''' was a sonic blaster pistol designed by the [[Systech Corporation/Legends|Systech Corporation]]. Designed by [[Systech Corporation/Legends|Systech Corporation]] weapons manufacturing company, it was an awkward weapon, which was difficult to wield without special training. Shaped like a pistol with auxiliary sonic emitters attached to either side of the barrel, the aural blaster could deafen a target with a successful hit. Though inferior in damage potential to traditional [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], the blaster's design made it a viable weapon, with its deafening and disorientating capabilities. This weapon dealt a type of damage called sonic damage which meant it could not be deflected by a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] as a normal [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt could.<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide" />

It was said that [[Loppak Slusk]], an [[Exchange]] boss on [[Telos IV]] during the [[First Jedi Purge]], was known to have wielded this type of blaster.

==Behind the scenes==
This blaster's name is misspelled as "Aurial blaster" in the ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''.

*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
